task: Normalize a FHIR R4 Bundle to USCDI v3 data class JSON: { format, source_format, patient, encounters[], conditions[], observations[], medications[], procedures[], immunizations[], allergies[], documents[], diagnostic_reports[], care_plans[] }. Each USCDI data class maps from one or more FHIR resource types. PHI (MRN, name, addresses, dates of birth refined) is redacted to opaque hashes at the boundary.

recipes.name: fhir-uscdi
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var b=(input&&input.bundle)||{},es=Array.isArray(b.entry)?b.entry:[],N=null,SCT='http://snomed.info/sct',LNC='http://loinc.org',o={format:'uscdi-v3',source_format:'fhir-r4-bundle',patient:{mrn_redacted:N,name_redacted:N,dob:N,gender:N,race:N,ethnicity:N,preferred_language:N},encounters:[],conditions:[],observations:[],medications:[],procedures:[],immunizations:[],allergies:[],documents:[],diagnostic_reports:[],care_plans:[]};function P(r,sy){var c=r&&r.code&&r.code.coding||[];for(var i=0;i<c.length;i++)if(c[i].system===sy)return c[i].code||N;return N;}for(var i=0;i<es.length;i++){var r=(es[i]&&es[i].resource)||{},t=r.resourceType||'',s=r.status||N,p=r.period||{},it=r.intent||N;if(t==='Patient'){var nm=(r.name&&r.name[0])||{},g=(nm.given&&nm.given[0])||'';o.patient.mrn_redacted='<hash>';o.patient.name_redacted=(g[0]||'')+'.'+((nm.family||'')[0]||'')+'.';o.patient.dob=(r.birthDate||'').slice(0,4)||N;o.patient.gender=r.gender||N;}else if(t==='Encounter')o.encounters.push({id:r.id||'',type:N,class:(r['class']&&r['class'].code)||N,period_start:p.start||N,period_end:p.end||N,location:N,participants:[],reason_codes:[]});else if(t==='Condition')o.conditions.push({snomed_ct:P(r,SCT),icd10:P(r,'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm'),onset:r.onsetDateTime||N,clinical_status:N,verification_status:N});else if(t==='Observation'){var vq=r.valueQuantity||{};o.observations.push({loinc:P(r,LNC),value:vq.value||N,unit:vq.unit||N,effective:r.effectiveDateTime||N,status:s,category:N});}else if(t==='MedicationRequest'||t==='MedicationStatement')o.medications.push({rxnorm:N,ndc:N,status:s,intent:it,dosage:N,period_start:N,period_end:N});else if(t==='Procedure')o.procedures.push({snomed_ct:P(r,SCT),cpt:P(r,'http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt'),performed:r.performedDateTime||N,status:s});else if(t==='Immunization')o.immunizations.push({cvx:P(r,'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx'),status:s,occurrence:r.occurrenceDateTime||N});else if(t==='AllergyIntolerance')o.allergies.push({allergen_snomed:N,reaction:N,criticality:r.criticality||N,type:r.type||N});else if(t==='DocumentReference')o.documents.push({type_loinc:N,status:s,encoded_size_bytes:0});else if(t==='DiagnosticReport')o.diagnostic_reports.push({loinc:P(r,LNC),status:s,effective:r.effectiveDateTime||N,conclusion_present:!!r.conclusion});else if(t==='CarePlan')o.care_plans.push({status:s,intent:it,period_start:p.start||N,period_end:p.end||N});}return o;}

pack.description: FHIR R4 resource-to-USCDI v3 class map, canonical coding-system priority, and PHI redaction policy. v4 candidate fields ride through with a _uscdi_class:'v4_candidate' tag.
